item.title: 争夺人工智能未来：谷歌、甲骨文、微软、AWS 试图满足永不满足的需求
item.summary: Hyperscalers are embracing unprecedented financing strategies and partnerships as AI demand forces massive investments in next-generation data center infrastructure. The post Race for AI Future: Google, Oracle, Microsoft, AWS Try to Meet Insatiable Demand appeared first on Cloud Wars.
